title: Listening - Part 2
description: For each question, choose the correct answer.
instructions: You will hear six short extracts. For questions 8–13, choose the answer (A, B or C) which fits best according to what you hear.

extracts.context: You will hear two friends talking about joining a club.
extracts.audio_script: Woman: Are you joining the walking club? || Man: I might. I like walking, but I don't want anything too serious. || Woman: They have different groups. || Man: That's good. [8]I'm interested because the club organises walks in places I couldn't easily reach without a car[/8]. || Woman: The coach leaves from the town hall. || Man: Perfect. I don't need to buy expensive equipment then. || Woman: That must be useful. || Man: It is, especially when there are several things to think about.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Are you joining the walking club?

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: I might. I like walking, but I don't want anything too serious.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: They have different groups.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: That's good. I'm interested because the club organises walks in places I couldn't easily reach without a car.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: The coach leaves from the town hall.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Perfect. I don't need to buy expensive equipment then.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: That must be useful.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: It is, especially when there are several things to think about.

questions.question: Why is the man interested in the walking club?

options.C: It visits places he cannot easily get to.

questions.explanation: He says the club organises walks in places he couldn't easily reach without a car.

extracts.context: You will hear a woman talking about a family meal.
extracts.audio_script: Man: How was your family meal on Sunday? || Woman: Better than usual, actually. My brother and I normally argue about everything. || Man: What changed? || Woman: [9]We cooked together before everyone arrived, and that gave us something practical to focus on instead of old disagreements[/9]. || Man: Did the food turn out well? || Woman: Yes, everyone liked it. Maybe we'll cook together again next time. || Man: That sounds sensible. || Woman: Yes, I think it will make things much easier next time.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: How was your family meal on Sunday?

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Better than usual, actually. My brother and I normally argue about everything.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: What changed?

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: We cooked together before everyone arrived, and that gave us something practical to focus on instead of old disagreements.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Did the food turn out well?

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Yes, everyone liked it. Maybe we'll cook together again next time.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: That sounds sensible.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Yes, I think it will make things much easier next time.

questions.question: Why was the meal better than usual?

options.B: Preparing it helped people get on.

questions.explanation: She says cooking together gave them something practical to focus on instead of disagreements.

extracts.context: You will hear two students talking about a science lesson.
extracts.audio_script: Girl: Did you understand today's science lesson? || Boy: Mostly. The experiment was fun, and the teacher explained the results clearly. || Girl: I liked it too. || Boy: [10]The only thing I didn't enjoy was writing everything down afterwards. It took longer than doing the experiment[/10]. || Girl: We need the notes for revision. || Boy: I know, but I'd rather learn by doing things. || Girl: I can see why. || Boy: Yes, it wasn't what I expected, but I learnt something useful.

dialogue.speaker: girl
dialogue.text: Did you understand today's science lesson?

dialogue.speaker: boy
dialogue.text: Mostly. The experiment was fun, and the teacher explained the results clearly.

dialogue.speaker: girl
dialogue.text: I liked it too.

dialogue.speaker: boy
dialogue.text: The only thing I didn't enjoy was writing everything down afterwards. It took longer than doing the experiment.

dialogue.speaker: girl
dialogue.text: We need the notes for revision.

dialogue.speaker: boy
dialogue.text: I know, but I'd rather learn by doing things.

dialogue.speaker: girl
dialogue.text: I can see why.

dialogue.speaker: boy
dialogue.text: Yes, it wasn't what I expected, but I learnt something useful.

questions.question: What did the boy dislike about the lesson?
questions.explanation: He says he did not enjoy writing everything down afterwards.

extracts.context: You will hear a man telling a friend about a visit to the dentist.
extracts.audio_script: Woman: How was the dentist? You looked worried this morning. || Man: I was, but it was fine. I didn't need any treatment. || Woman: That's good. || Man: Yes. [11]What surprised me was the new dentist. She explained everything so calmly that I felt relaxed almost immediately[/11]. || Woman: So you'll go back? || Man: Definitely. I shouldn't have delayed it for so long. || Woman: Good idea. || Man: I'll do that, and then I won't have to worry about it again. || Woman: I understand. || Man: Thanks.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: How was the dentist? You looked worried this morning.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: I was, but it was fine. I didn't need any treatment.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: That's good.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Yes. What surprised me was the new dentist. She explained everything so calmly that I felt relaxed almost immediately.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: So you'll go back?

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Definitely. I shouldn't have delayed it for so long.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Good idea.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: I'll do that, and then I won't have to worry about it again.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: I understand.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Thanks.

questions.question: What surprised the man about his dentist visit?
questions.explanation: He says the dentist explained things calmly and he felt relaxed quickly.

extracts.context: You will hear two people talking about a community garden.
extracts.audio_script: Man: Have you seen the community garden behind the library? || Woman: Yes, I helped there last weekend. || Man: Was it hard work? || Woman: A bit, but enjoyable. [12]I liked meeting neighbours I had only seen in the street before. Working together made conversation much easier[/12]. || Man: Did you grow anything? || Woman: We planted herbs, but they'll take a while. The social side was the best part for me. || Man: That makes sense. || Woman: Exactly, and I feel much happier about it now.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Have you seen the community garden behind the library?

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Yes, I helped there last weekend.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Was it hard work?

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: A bit, but enjoyable. I liked meeting neighbours I had only seen in the street before. Working together made conversation much easier.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Did you grow anything?

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: We planted herbs, but they'll take a while. The social side was the best part for me.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: That makes sense.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Exactly, and I feel much happier about it now.

questions.question: What did the woman enjoy most about the community garden?
questions.explanation: She says meeting neighbours and talking while working together was the best part.

extracts.context: You will hear a woman talking about a theatre workshop.
extracts.audio_script: Speaker: I joined a theatre workshop because a friend recommended it. I thought we'd spend the day acting, which made me nervous, but it was different. [13]Most of the workshop was about using your voice clearly, so it was useful for giving presentations at work[/13]. We did one short scene at the end, and that was fun, but the practical speaking advice was what I really took away. I would recommend it to anyone who wants something practical and simple.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: I joined a theatre workshop because a friend recommended it. I thought we'd spend the day acting, which made me nervous, but it was different. Most of the workshop was about using your voice clearly, so it was useful for giving presentations at work. We did one short scene at the end, and that was fun, but the practical speaking advice was what I really took away. I would recommend it to anyone who wants something practical and simple.

questions.question: What was the main benefit of the workshop for the woman?

options.A: It helped her make new friends.
options.B: It taught her acting skills for the stage.
options.C: It gave her useful speaking advice.

questions.explanation: She says the workshop was mostly about using her voice clearly and was useful for work presentations.
